title: sisymbrium matritense
intro: Sisymbrium matritense, also known as Torrecilla or Spanish Hoarypea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Sisymbrium matritense is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to support skin health.
